strategy: She opens with Doom and Gloom, so your heals are cut - bring shields and absorbs instead of relying on healing.
End of round 1 she hits every wizard with a -50% Accuracy Darkness aura for the whole fight. Stack accuracy enchants/gear or you will fizzle constantly.
Feinting her makes her cleanse all traps off herself. Protect the Feint with Indemnity, or hit the same round you trap; note Mass Feint and pet spells also trigger it.
Expect Dark Nova/Dark Fiend/Dark Shepherd immediate hits and pip-stealing natural attacks - shield and do not over-bank pips.
Funnel blades to one hitter, keep Indemnity on the Feint, and burst her 23,900 down.
cheatNotes: She casts Doom and Gloom at the start, cutting healing. Rely on shields and absorbs, not heals.
End of round 1, all wizards get a -50% Accuracy Darkness aura for 99 rounds. Stack accuracy or your hits will fizzle.
She throws out Dark Nova, Dark Fiend, and Dark Shepherd immediate hits, or a pip-stealing natural attack. Shield up and do not hoard pips.
If you cast a spell on yourself she interrupts to nudge you to target allies - no real effect, just a lost beat.
Feinting her makes her cleanse all traps off herself. Use Indemnity or trap-and-hit the same round.
Indemnity on the Feint prevents the cleanse. Recommended.
Mass Feint (+75%) also triggers the cleanse.
Pet-cast spells (like pet Feints) also trigger the cleanse.
